hero.sub: Hover over moments and emotions to color the surface with fragrance

overlay.title: Sillage
overlay.sub: Every emotion has blossomed into scent

lines.desc:
When we're sad, when we're happy, when we want to convey our hearts — we write.
Even in a single diary line or a brief message, emotions are deeply embedded.
Writing is the most honest record of how we express ourselves.

A single familiar scent can revive a forgotten moment.
Scent connects people to people, and for some, it becomes a language that expresses who they are more deeply than words.

lines.text: We bridge the space between them.
lines.desc:
For centuries, research and attempts to connect scent with emotion and sensation have never ceased.
That accumulation fueled the fragrance industry, and today people discover identity and narrative in scent.
Scentive completes that link with data.

lines.text: Emotions become fragrance, preserved in data.
lines.desc:
Yet scent has long been interpreted through intuition alone.
Scentive builds a precise database connecting emotions and scent by learning from tens of thousands of diary entries, public datasets, and the chemical properties of aroma molecules.

lines.text: Data becomes a vast map of scent.
lines.desc:
The ability to analyze what was once abstract scent through quantitative data — that itself is innovation.
Scentive's scent map starts from personal diaries and grows into an infrastructure universally applicable to anyone, in any context.

howItWorks.title: From daily emotions to your signature scent

steps.title: Write your diary
steps.desc:
Freely record what happened today and how you felt.
You can add emotion tags to capture your mood.

steps.title: AI analyzes your emotions
steps.desc: From a month's worth of diary entries, it extracts emotion, sensory, and descriptive keywords and identifies patterns.

steps.title: Your scent recipe is created
steps.desc: Extracted keywords are matched against a database of 50 scent accords to compose your own recipe of top, middle, and base notes.

steps.title: Archived as a scent report
steps.desc:
That month's perfume is completed and saved in your archive.
Twelve perfume bottles fill up one by one.

part1.heading:
Everyone has their own
signature scent of life
part1.body:
We discovered fragrance in someone's diary.
Memories bloom into scent, and emotions linger as smell.
So why have we only focused on sight and sound?
Smell is the most primal and most personal sense.
Scentive gives that sense a language for the first time.
part1.accent: "Everyone deserves a scent of their own."

senses.label: Sight
senses.desc: The language of color and light

senses.label: Hearing
senses.desc: The language of sound and rhythm

senses.label: Touch
senses.desc: The language of texture and temperature

senses.label: Taste
senses.desc: The language of flavor and aroma

part2.heading:
When scent becomes data,
the world changes

visions.title: Hyper-personalized scent service
visions.desc:
The more your emotional data accumulates, the more refined your scent recipe becomes.
A fragrance that is yours and yours alone.

visions.title: Psychotherapy & spatial design
visions.desc: A new methodology for designing spaces and experiences through emotion-scent mapping data.

visions.title: A foundational sense for physical AI
visions.desc:
When digital AI understands smell, the world changes completely.
Scentive creates that language.

part2.footerPrefix: Scentive is not just an app.
part2.footerStrong: It is the first data infrastructure for building the language of scent.

appCta.sub: Start now, and in one month you'll receive your very first personalized scent recipe.
